name: Jordan Lee
description: MCP tool configuration for QA Engineer — Dispatch Core squad

filesystem.notes: Scoped to test directories only. Can read source files for context but primary write access is test code.

github.notes: Use for: reading source code to understand what to test, reading PRs to assess test coverage gaps. Never approve or merge.

brave-search.notes: Use for: Cypress documentation, Playwright API docs, Jest matchers, TestRail API reference

usage_guidance.filesystem: Read existing Cypress specs before writing new ones — check for existing cy.task() helpers and custom commands in support/.
usage_guidance.github: Read PRs to identify missing test coverage. Read source files (src/domain/) to understand business rules before writing test cases.
usage_guidance.brave-search: Look up Cypress intercept patterns, Playwright multi-page API, Jest mock patterns for TypeScript.

not_configured.testrail_api: TestRail managed manually — Claude generates test case content, Jordan imports via CSV or TestRail UI
not_configured.ci_trigger: GitHub Actions CI not accessible via MCP — CI triggered by git push only, never by Claude directly
